task_completion.description: The sentence words are arranged in a single horizontal line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 10 words of the sentence ('The autonomous rover navigated the crater despite severe dust storms') are laid out horizontally across the draw.io canvas.

task_completion.description: Part-of-Speech tags are positioned below each word.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text elements representing POS tags (such as DET, ADJ, NOUN, VERB, ADP) are placed directly underneath their corresponding words in the diagram.

task_completion.description: Curved arrows arch above the text to represent dependency relations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Curved connector lines/arrows are drawn above the horizontal line of words, connecting head words to dependent words.

task_completion.description: Each curved arrow is labeled with its specific dependency relation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The curved arrows have text labels attached to them (e.g., nsubj, dobj, det, amod, case, compound, obl).

task_completion.description: The words 'dust storms' are highlighted with red text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific text elements for 'dust' and 'storms' (or the combined phrase) are colored red in the diagram.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as a .drawio file and exported as a .pdf file in the ~/Diagrams/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save/export dialogs, file explorer windows, or terminal outputs showing 'dependency_parse.drawio' and 'dependency_parse.pdf' successfully created in the 'Diagrams' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Diagrams.net (draw.io) graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io application open with the diagram being actively constructed using its tools, rather than a script generating the files blindly.

integrity.description: The diagram consists of genuine draw.io elements rather than an imported image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text boxes, arrows, and labels appear as selectable/editable vector objects in the draw.io interface, not as a single pasted image of a pre-existing parse tree.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy a pre-existing PDF or drawio file from another location.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the step-by-step creation of the diagram elements (typing words, drawing arrows, changing colors) prior to saving and exporting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The sentence contains exactly 10 words. There should be exactly 9 dependency relations (curved arrows) labeled with types from this set: [det, amod, nsubj, dobj, case, compound, obl]. The root verb is 'navigated' (POS: VERB). Valid POS tags to look for below the words are DET, ADJ, NOUN, VERB, ADP. The expected output files are /home/ga/Diagrams/dependency_parse.drawio and /home/ga/Diagrams/dependency_parse.pdf.
